owner: Request body proof: top-level context_block.group_context was non-empty.
summary: 基于 exact persisted step2g 证据，canonical trusted broadcast 的 request body 形状已被证明正确：top-level author_kind=system，author.author_kind=system，且 context_block.group_context 非空；但 response 与 latest group event 都已显示 author_kind=agent、context_block={}，因此首个断点是 ingress normalization。
blocker: ingress normalization：请求 body 已携带正确的 system + non-empty group_context，但 live backend 在 response/event 层就将其归一化为 author_kind=agent 且 context_block={}。
tests: Request body proof: top-level author_kind=system and author.author_kind=system.
